ddls:
CREATE TABLE "films" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each film */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the film */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of release */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the film */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin */,
  "content_rating" TEXT /* Content rating of the film */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the film in minutes */,
  "aspect_ratio" TEXT /* Aspect ratio of the film */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the film */,
  "gross_earnings" REAL /* Gross earnings of the film */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director associated with the film */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre associated with the film */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the film */,
  "imdb_rating" REAL /* IMDB rating of the film */,
  "rotten_tomatoes_rating" REAL /* Rotten Tomatoes rating of the film */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_films_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_films_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the director */,
  "facebook_likes" INTEGER /* Number of Facebook likes for the director */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the director */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the director */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Death date of the director (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the actor */,
  "facebook_likes" INTEGER /* Number of Facebook likes for the actor */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the actor */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the actor */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Death date of the actor (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_actors" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor appearing in the film */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played by the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id", "actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "user_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes the review has received */,
  "user_review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "critic_reviews" (
  "critic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each critic review */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film being reviewed */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the critic */,
  "publication" TEXT /* Publication where the review was published */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("critic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_critic_reviews_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_metrics" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "facebook_likes_movie" INTEGER /* Total number of Facebook likes for the film */,
  "total_facebook_likes_cast" INTEGER /* Total number of Facebook likes for all cast members */,
  "imdb_votes" INTEGER /* Number of IMDB votes for the film */,
  "imdb_rating" REAL /* IMDB rating of the film */,
  "rotten_tomatoes_rating" REAL /* Rotten Tomatoes rating of the film */,
  "metacritic_rating" REAL /* Metacritic rating of the film */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account (hashed for security) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
